title: narnia
prompt:
A sprawling, majestic citadel of white stone and gleaming gold spires. The city is bursting at the seams—thousands of citizens crowd the bustling markets, and massive construction cranes erect new towers to expand the borders. High walls encircle the kingdom.

INT. THE GRAND PLAZA - CONTINUOUS

A massive stone statue stands in the center of the square: KING AETHEL, depicted as a holy Vanguard warrior, his sword piercing the skull of a roaring, monstrous beast.

The current, living KING AETHEL stands on a high balcony overlooking his people. Beside him stands GENERAL TORGON, a towering, armored warlord scarred by a thousand battles.

AETHEL
(Voice amplified by magic)
Look upon our borders, children of Aethelgard! We multiply, we build, we conquer the wilderness. But do not let prosperity breed complacency. Deep within the forbidden northern wastes, in the black ruins of the old world, the enemy still breathes.

The crowd grows quiet. Fear ripples through the masses.

AETHEL (CONT'D)
The Daemon In The Frost. The ultimate devil of the old era, locked away in an eternal block of ice. It waits. It hungers for our demise. We must grow stronger, more numerous, and more unified every single day. For only a massive, roaring civilization will have the strength to stand when the Daemon breaks his chains!

The crowd erupts into roaring cheers.

Behind Aethel, General Torgon steps forward, bowing his head.

TORGON
The garrisons are full, Your Grace. The population expands exactly according to the countdown.

Aethel turns back to his chamber, a dark, calculating smirk replacing his benevolent smile.

[SCENE END]
